ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot carefully holding a ledger, emphasizing precision and attentiveness.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting careful handling of important documents. The sequence starts with the arms at rest, then moves to a position holding the ledger, and ends with a slight adjustment for stability.  The right arm will do most of the work, while the left arm provides support.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready for the ledger
right arm extends to grasp the ledger carefully
adjusting grip, holding the ledger steady
a final subtle shift, securing the important book
